zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Glastonia於1141年出生在英國英格蘭戴文亞爾可姆時，她的父親Robert de Glastonia27歲，母親Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield23歲。她於1170年與Roger de Newburgh在英國英格蘭多瑟特雲福利特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1199年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布盧姆費爾德享年58歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特武爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Glastonia于1141年出生在英国英格兰戴文亞爾可姆时，她的父亲Robert de Glastonia27岁，母亲Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield23岁。她于1170年与Roger de Newburgh在英国英格兰多瑟特雲福利特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1199年在英国英格兰薩默塞特布盧姆費爾德享年58岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特武爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Glastonia was born in 1141, in Yarcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Glastonia, was 27 and her mother, Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield, was 23. She married Roger de Newburgh in 1170, in Winfrith, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1199, in Broomfield, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wool, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Glastonia est née en 1141, à Yarcombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Glastonia, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Newburgh en 1170, à Winfrith, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1199, à Broomfield, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Wool, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.Winfrith Manor, Winfrith Newburgh, Dorse: Winfrith Newburgh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Glastonia 1141 in Yarcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Glastonia 27 und ihre Mutter Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield 23. Sie hat 1170 in Winfrith, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Roger de Newburgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1199 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Broomfield, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wool, Dorset, England begraben.

Lei sposato Roger de Newburgh nel 1170, nel Winfrith, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1199, nel Broomfield, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Wool, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Glastoniaが1141年にイギリスイギリスデボンヤーコンベで生まれた時，父Robert de Glastoniaは27歳，母Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfieldは23歳であった。1170年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンフリスでRoger de Newburghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1199年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブルームフィールドで58歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Glastonia(이)가 1141년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 야르코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Glastonia(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈프리스에서 Roger de Newburgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브룸필드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 보에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Glastonia nasceu em 1141, em Yarcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Glastonia, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Newburgh em 1170, em Winfrith, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Glastonia родилась в 1141 г. в местности яркомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Glastonia было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Percy heiress of Broomfield, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Newburgh в 1170 г. в местности винфрит, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1199 г. в местности брумфиелд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности вул, дорсет, Англия.
